# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: myapplication
description: A Helm chart for My Application

# This is the chart version. This version number should be incremented each time you make changes to the chart.
version: 0.1.0

# This is the version of the application being deployed.
appVersion: 1.0.0

templates:
  - name: myapplication-deployment.yaml
    content: |
      apiVersion: apps/v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
        name: {{ .Values.name }}
        labels:
          app: {{ .Values.name }}
      spec:
        replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
        selector:
          matchLabels:
            app: {{ .Values.name }}
        template:
          metadata:
            labels:
              app: {{ .Values.name }}
          spec:
            containers:
            - name: {{ .Values.name }}
              image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
              ports:
              - name: http
                containerPort: {{ .Values.service.port }}
                protocol: TCP
